meta.title: CURATOR
meta.description: Youth clothing — editorial curation, cash on delivery.

home.heroTagline: The Modern Youth Uniform. Redefined for the Discerning.
home.campaignBody: A limited exploration of shadow and silhouette. Crafted in small batches.
home.newsletterBody: Exclusive early access to lookbooks and drops. No noise, just curation.
home.newsletterThanks: Thank you — we will be in touch.
home.article1Excerpt: Why proportion, fabric weight, and quiet tailoring define this season’s silhouettes.
home.article2Excerpt: From raw fiber to finished piece — how we choose mills and finishes for daily wear.
home.article3Excerpt: Fewer drops, longer life: the editorial lens behind every release.

footer.mission: Defining the intersection of youth culture and high-end craftsmanship. Sustainably made, thoughtfully curated.
footer.newsletterHint: Sign up in-store or via our editorial list.

products.title: Summer
products.intro: A curated collection of architectural basics, crafted with premium natural fibers and designed for the modern silhouette.

product.success: Order placed. We will contact you soon.

admin.title: Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Orders & inventory
admin.imagesHint: One URL per line. Files in public/: use a site path starting with / (e.g. /Body%20tee/photo.webp) — not a disk path like public/...
admin.uploadImagesHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or AVIF. First image is the main photo on the shop; order matches the gallery.
admin.uploadCopyHint: You can pick files from anywhere on your computer. Each file is copied to public/uploads/p and served at /api/uploads/p/… (dashed tiles show the local preview while it saves).
admin.imageOrderHint: First = cover, then left-to-right in the gallery.
admin.uploadError: Upload failed. Try smaller files or fewer at once.
admin.noRecognizedImages: No supported images in that selection. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or AVIF (or export HEIC as JPEG from Photos).
admin.noImagesYet: No photos yet — add at least one to save the product.
admin.needOneImage: Add at least one photo before saving.
admin.waitForUploads: Wait until all photos finish saving to the server.
admin.extraCategoriesHint: Other categories on this product (uncheck to remove)
admin.dashIntro: Here is what is happening in your store today.
admin.newProductsCaption: {count} new listings in the last 30 days

thankYou.title: Thank you for your order
thankYou.body: We received your order successfully. Our team will contact you shortly to confirm shipping details.
